physical_source: Downloaded from CB_X / AeroPoint / DGPS receiver after the occupation
how_to_obtain: Each GCP device records raw observations during its occupation. Downloaded per point either via USB, the CB companion app, the Propeller dashboard (AeroPoint), or the receiver manufacturer's utility (DGPS). Recording must span the drone flight window with buffer.
notes: Per-point machine truth. One file per occupation. Antenna type and delta-H here serve as cross-checks against the user form.

physical_source: Exported from CB_X device or DGPS companion app
how_to_obtain: Device firmware records a session log per occupation. Required for DGPS. Expected-absent for CB_X (CB_X has its own oplog dev spec — see CB_X Operation Log spec). Expected-absent for AEROPOINT (Propeller hardware does not expose one in this format). Expected-absent for OTHER (unknown hardware).
notes: Behaviour branches on device_type. When expected-absent, the integrity indicator scores from RINEX-only signals; when expected-present and missing, integrity degrades to unconfirmed.

physical_source: Entered by operator in CB capture app at upload, one record per occupation
how_to_obtain: Structured field form filled per occupation. Human-entered: device_type, antenna model/height/method/reference/count, monument facts, device_id, target metadata. Target size and placement confirmation captured here but consumed by pre_processing_score, not gcp_score.
notes: Per-point operator metadata. Form design itself is the safeguard against #6 antenna-height blunder. target_size_m is on this form but read by pre-processing, not gcp_score.
